attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
GG_SOURCE.MASTER_SOURCE_ID,
GG_SOURCE.THEATRE_CODE,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_TYPE,
GG_SOURCE.CALENDAR_TYPE,
/*GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_NAME,
GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME,
GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME_INV,*/
TRANSLATE(GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_NAME  USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOURCE_NAME,
TRANSLATE(GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME  USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME,
TRANSLATE(GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME_INV  USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME_INV,
GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_COUNTRY,
GG_SOURCE.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE,
GG_SOURCE.CONTRACT_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
GG_SOURCE.CONTRACT_OBSOLETE_DATE,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_EDI_ID,
GG_SOURCE.SORT_ORDER,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_DATE_FORMAT,
GG_SOURCE.ACTIVE_FLAG,
GG_SOURCE.CREATED_BY,
GG_SOURCE.CREATED_DATE,
GG_SOURCE.UPDATED_BY,
GG_DIST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_COUNTRY_NAME,
GG_SOURCE.SALESREP_NAME,
GG_SOURCE.CLAIM_DATE_FORMAT,
GG_SOURCE.CC_CISCO_FOR_CLAIMS,
GG_SOURCE.CC_CISCO_FOR_POS,
GG_SOURCE.CCO_ACCESS,
GG_SOURCE.DISTI_TYPE,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_ABBR,
GG_SOURCE.TERRITORY_ID,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_XML_ID,
GG_SOURCE.SALES_CREDIT,
GG_SOURCE.PDB_DISTRIBUTOR_SOURCE,
GG_SOURCE.ATTRIBUTE1,
COALESCE(GG_SOURCE.SALES_TERRITORY_ID,-999),
GG_SOURCE.DSV_FLAG,
GG_SOURCE.NET_PRICE_FLAG ,
GG_DIST.SOURCE_DML_TYPE ,
GG_DIST.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,
GG_DIST.REFRESH_DATETIME ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME,
GG_SOURCE.SFP_FLAG
FROM 
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.GG_WIPS_SOURCE_PROFILES GG_SOURCE,
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.GG_DCA_DISTI_ACCOUNTS GG_DIST
  WHERE GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID = GG_DIST.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
  AND GG_DIST.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))
   AND GG_DIST.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE' 
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY GG_DIST.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID ORDER BY GG_DIST.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1

  UNION
  
SELECT GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
GG_SOURCE.MASTER_SOURCE_ID,
GG_SOURCE.THEATRE_CODE,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_TYPE,
GG_SOURCE.CALENDAR_TYPE,
/*GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_NAME,
GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME,
GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME_INV,*/
TRANSLATE(GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_NAME  USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOURCE_NAME,
TRANSLATE(GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME  USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME,
TRANSLATE(GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME_INV  USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME_INV,
GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_SOURCE_COUNTRY,
GG_SOURCE.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE,
GG_SOURCE.CONTRACT_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
GG_SOURCE.CONTRACT_OBSOLETE_DATE,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_EDI_ID,
GG_SOURCE.SORT_ORDER,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_DATE_FORMAT,
GG_SOURCE.ACTIVE_FLAG,
GG_SOURCE.CREATED_BY,
GG_SOURCE.CREATED_DATE,
GG_SOURCE.UPDATED_BY,
GG_SOURCE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
GG_SOURCE.REPORTING_COUNTRY_NAME,
GG_SOURCE.SALESREP_NAME,
GG_SOURCE.CLAIM_DATE_FORMAT,
GG_SOURCE.CC_CISCO_FOR_CLAIMS,
GG_SOURCE.CC_CISCO_FOR_POS,
GG_SOURCE.CCO_ACCESS,
GG_SOURCE.DISTI_TYPE,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_ABBR,
GG_SOURCE.TERRITORY_ID,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_XML_ID,
GG_SOURCE.SALES_CREDIT,
GG_SOURCE.PDB_DISTRIBUTOR_SOURCE,
GG_SOURCE.ATTRIBUTE1,
COALESCE(GG_SOURCE.SALES_TERRITORY_ID,-999),
GG_SOURCE.DSV_FLAG,
GG_SOURCE.NET_PRICE_FLAG ,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_DML_TYPE ,
GG_SOURCE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,
GG_SOURCE.REFRESH_DATETIME ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME,
GG_SOURCE.SFP_FLAG
FROM 
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.GG_WIPS_SOURCE_PROFILES GG_SOURCE
WHERE
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))
   AND
    SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE' 
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SOURCE_PROFILE_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
